name: Metro
description_short: Metro by T-Mobile is a prepaid wireless carrier offering month-to-month 5G mobile plans with no contracts, activation fees, or early termination fees.
description_long: Metro by T-Mobile is a prepaid mobile phone service provider operated under the T-Mobile network infrastructure. The company was established to provide affordable wireless options without the constraints of traditional carrier contracts. Metro offers prepaid plans ranging from $20 to $60 monthly with unlimited 5G data, device financing options, and promotional offers including free phones and device discounts. The service includes tax and fee transparency, with all government taxes included in advertised monthly prices and no hidden activation charges for online enrollment. Metro's core offerings include unlimited 5G data plans at multiple price tiers, device sales and upgrades, AutoPay enrollment for discounted rates, and optional add-on services like tablet and smartwatch lines ($5/month). Plans feature a 5-year price guarantee on talk, text, and data for qualified customers, and customers can bring their own devices or purchase new ones including iPhones and Samsung Galaxy models. The company provides free shipping, online activation without fees, and an easy-pay account management system accessible via their website and mobile app. Metro distinguishes itself through its no-contract model, transparent pricing structure (taxes included), and integration with T-Mobile's 5G network infrastructure. The $60/month plan marketed as "OUR BEST VALUE" includes benefits like Amazon Prime access, HD video streaming, included phone upgrades after 12 months, and a 20% discount on one-line pricing when purchasing four lines. The company emphasizes affordability and flexibility, explicitly positioning itself as an alternative to traditional postpaid carriers with their marketing tagline "Get that more for your money feeling." Metro by T-Mobile operates as a budget prepaid wireless carrier with transparent terms and competitive pricing for prepaid service. However, consumers should note that data throttling occurs above specified thresholds (35GB+ for lower-tier plans, 70GB+ for premium plans), and video streams are limited to SD or HD depending on plan selection. Customer service is available via phone, chat, and online support. The company's no-contract model and tax-inclusive pricing provide genuine value, though the service inherently lacks the flexibility of some competitors regarding contract-free device financing.
services: Device sales and financing (iPhone 17e, iPhone 16e, Samsung Galaxy A17 5G)
AutoPay enrollment with discounted monthly rates
Free phone promotions and device trade-in programs
Bring-your-own-device activation with no activation fees
Tablet and smartwatch line add-ons ($5/month when bringing device)
Amazon Prime included with $60 premium plan
Phone upgrade eligibility after 12 months of service
Account management via web portal with AutoPay enrollment
Customer support via phone (1-888-8-METRO-8), chat, and online ticketing
In-store and online shopping with free shipping
pros: No activation fees for online enrollment; $25 in-store fee only
No early termination fees — completely contract-free service
Government taxes and fees included in advertised monthly price (full transparency)
5-year price guarantee on talk, text, and data available to qualified customers
Unlimited 5G data on all plans with no overage charges
AutoPay discount reduces $60 plan to $40/month for new customers prepaying 6 months
Free shipping on device orders and no activation fees online
cons: Data throttling occurs when usage exceeds plan-specific thresholds (35GB or 70GB+) during network congestion
Video streaming limited to SD quality on $20-$40 plans; only HD available on premium $60 plan
In-store device activation/changes cost $25 per line, creating offline fee barriers
Company is miscategorized as 'payday-alternatives' when it operates as a prepaid wireless carrier with no financial lending component
best_for: Budget-conscious consumers seeking month-to-month wireless service without contracts
Users wanting transparent pricing with taxes and fees included upfront
Customers willing to trade video quality for significant monthly savings on unlimited 5G data
Multi-line households eligible for the 20% four-line discount on the $60 premium plan
diagnosis: Metro by T-Mobile is best for value-conscious consumers seeking no-contract prepaid wireless service with transparent, all-inclusive pricing on T-Mobile's 5G network. The main caveat is that this is a wireless carrier—not a financial services or lending company—and was incorrectly categorized under 'payday-alternatives'; it should be classified under 'banking' or a wireless/telecommunications category.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
